Theme.name: Catppuccin Mocha (Mobile)
Theme.description: Theme based on catppuccin mocha color scheme, for mobile users only.
Theme.themeJson: {  "themes": [    {      "id": "catppuccin_mocha_mobile",      "name": "Catppuccin Mocha (Mobile)",      "palette": {        "note_by_dev": "Catppuccin Mocha — dark palette",        "base":        "#1e1e2e",        "mantle":      "#181825",        "crust":       "#11111b",        "surface0":    "#313244",        "surface1":    "#45475a",        "surface2":    "#585b70",        "overlay0":    "#6c7086",        "overlay1":    "#7f849c",        "overlay2":    "#9399b2",        "subtext0":    "#a6adc8",        "subtext1":    "#bac2de",        "text":        "#cdd6f4",        "lavender":    "#b4befe",        "blue":        "#89b4fa",        "sapphire":    "#74c7ec",        "mauve":       "#cba6f7",        "pink":        "#f5c2e7",        "panelBg":     "rgba(24, 24, 37, 0.78)",        "panelBorder": "rgba(180, 190, 254, 0.14)",        "btnBg":       "rgba(69, 71, 90, 0.55)",        "btnBorder":   "rgba(180, 190, 254, 0.18)",        "btnIcon":     "#cdd6f4",        "btnDisabled": "rgba(205, 214, 244, 0.35)",        "chipBg":      "rgba(203, 166, 247, 0.16)",        "chipBorder":  "rgba(203, 166, 247, 0.38)",        "chipText":    "#cba6f7",        "accent":      "#cba6f7",        "accentAlt":   "#89b4fa"      },      "styles": {        "panel": {          "enabled":        true,          "showBackground": true,          "showBorder":     true,          "radius":         18,          "blur":           22,          "color":          "@panelBg",          "borderColor":    "@panelBorder",          "borderWidth":    0.8,          "padding":        { "horizontal": 12, "vertical": 8 },          "shadowBlur":     28,          "shadowOffsetY":  8,          "shadowColor":    "rgba(0,0,0,0.45)"        },        "button": {          "size":             42,          "iconSize":         22,          "radius":           14,          "blur":             12,          "color":            "@btnBg",          "borderColor":      "@btnBorder",          "borderWidth":      0.7,          "iconColor":        "@btnIcon",          "disabledIconColor":"@btnDisabled"        },        "primaryButton": {          "size":             56,          "iconSize":         30,          "radius":           18,          "blur":             16,          "color":            "rgba(203, 166, 247, 0.20)",          "borderColor":      "rgba(203, 166, 247, 0.45)",          "borderWidth":      1.0,          "iconColor":        "@accent",          "disabledIconColor":"rgba(203, 166, 247, 0.30)"        },        "chip": {          "radius":        12,          "color":         "@chipBg",          "backgroundColor":"@chipBg",          "borderColor":   "@chipBorder",          "borderWidth":   0.7,          "textColor":     "@chipText",          "fontSize":      11,          "fontWeight":    600,          "letterSpacing": 0.3,          "padding":       { "horizontal": 9, "vertical": 4 }        },        "text": {          "textColor":     "@text",          "fontSize":      13,          "fontWeight":    700,          "letterSpacing": 0.1,          "height":        1.2        }      },      "top": {        "alignment":    "topCenter",        "padding":      { "horizontal": 10, "vertical": 6 },        "hiddenOffset": [0, -1],        "showWhenLocked":   true,        "showWhenUnlocked": true,        "itemSpacing":  6,        "groupSpacing": 8,        "absoluteCenter": true,        "panelStyle": {          "padding": { "horizontal": 10, "vertical": 6 }        },        "normal": {          "left":   ["back"],          "center": [            {              "id": "watching_label",              "topText": "Now Playing",              "topFontSize": 10,              "topFontWeight": 500,              "topColor": "@accent",              "bottomFontSize": 13,              "bottomFontWeight": 700,              "bottomColor": "@text",              "gap": 1,              "textAlign": "center"            }          ],          "right": [            "lock_controls",            "open_settings"          ]        },        "locked": {          "left":   [],          "center": [],          "right":  ["unlock_controls"]        }      },      "middle": {        "alignment":    "center",        "padding":      { "horizontal": 16 },        "hiddenOffset": [0, 0],        "hiddenScale":  0.88,        "showWhenLocked":   false,        "showWhenUnlocked": true,        "itemSpacing":  12,        "panelStyle": {          "enabled": false        },        "normal": {          "items": [            "previous_episode",            "seek_back",            "play_pause",            "seek_forward",            "next_episode"          ]        }      },      "bottom": {        "alignment":    "bottomCenter",        "padding":      { "horizontal": 10, "vertical": 6 },        "hiddenOffset": [0, 1],        "showWhenLocked":   true,        "showWhenUnlocked": true,        "itemSpacing":  6,        "groupSpacing": 8,        "progressBottomSpacing": 8,        "outsidePadding": { "horizontal": 6, "bottom": 6 },        "panelStyle": {          "padding": { "horizontal": 10, "vertical": 8 }        },        "showProgress": true,        "progressStyle": "capsule",        "progressPadding": { "horizontal": 2 },        "progressActiveTrackColor":          "@accent",        "progressInactiveTrackColor":        "rgba(69,71,90,0.70)",        "progressSecondaryActiveTrackColor": "rgba(203,166,247,0.22)",        "progressThumbColor":                "@accent",        "normal": {          "outside": {            "left": [              {                "id": "time_current",                "style": { "textColor": "@subtext1", "fontSize": 11, "fontWeight": 500 }              },              {                "id": "text",                "text": "/",                "style": { "textColor": "@overlay1", "fontSize": 11 }              },              {                "id": "time_duration",                "style": { "textColor": "@subtext0", "fontSize": 11, "fontWeight": 500 }              }            ],            "center": [],            "right": [              "mega_seek"            ]          },          "left": [            "playlist",            "shaders",            "subtitles"          ],          "center": [],          "right": [            "audio_track",            "speed",            "quality",            "server",            "orientation",            "aspect_ratio"          ]        },        "locked": {          "left": [            {              "id": "time_current",              "style": { "textColor": "@subtext1", "fontSize": 11, "fontWeight": 500 }            }          ],          "right": [            {              "id": "time_duration",              "style": { "textColor": "@subtext0", "fontSize": 11, "fontWeight": 500 }            }          ]        }      }    }  ]}

Theme.name: Tokyo Night
Theme.description: Theme based on tokyo night, made for desktop idk if its gonna look ugly on mobile.
Theme.themeJson: {  "themes": [    {      "id": "tokyo_night",      "name": "Tokyo Night",      "palette": {        "note_by_dev": "Tokyo Night color palette — deep navy backgrounds, muted purples, electric cyan/blue accents, warm rose highlights",        "bg":          "rgba(26, 27, 38, 0.92)",        "bg_solid":    "rgba(26, 27, 38, 1.0)",        "bg_panel":    "rgba(36, 40, 59, 0.88)",        "bg_border":   "rgba(86, 95, 137, 0.40)",        "bg_border_hi":"rgba(122, 162, 247, 0.35)",        "accent":      "#7aa2f7",        "accent_dim":  "rgba(122, 162, 247, 0.18)",        "accent_glow": "rgba(122, 162, 247, 0.28)",        "cyan":        "#7dcfff",        "cyan_dim":    "rgba(125, 207, 255, 0.16)",        "purple":      "#bb9af7",        "purple_dim":  "rgba(187, 154, 247, 0.18)",        "rose":        "#f7768e",        "rose_dim":    "rgba(247, 118, 142, 0.18)",        "green":       "#9ece6a",        "green_dim":   "rgba(158, 206, 106, 0.16)",        "fg":          "#c0caf5",        "fg_dim":      "rgba(192, 202, 245, 0.65)",        "fg_faint":    "rgba(192, 202, 245, 0.35)",        "white":       "#ffffff",        "black":       "#000000",        "transparent": "transparent"      },      "styles": {        "panel": {          "enabled":        true,          "showBackground": true,          "showBorder":     true,          "radius":         20,          "blur":           22,          "color":          "@bg_panel",          "borderColor":    "@bg_border",          "borderWidth":    0.8,          "padding":        { "horizontal": 14, "vertical": 10 },          "shadowColor":    "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55)",          "shadowBlur":     28,          "shadowOffsetY":  10        },        "button": {          "size":               40,          "iconSize":           20,          "radius":             13,          "blur":               16,          "color":              "@bg_panel",          "borderColor":        "@bg_border",          "borderWidth":        0.8,          "iconColor":          "@fg",          "disabledIconColor":  "@fg_faint"        },        "primaryButton": {          "size":               56,          "iconSize":           28,          "radius":             18,          "blur":               20,          "color":              "@accent_dim",          "borderColor":        "@bg_border_hi",          "borderWidth":        1.0,          "iconColor":          "@accent",          "disabledIconColor":  "@fg_faint"        },        "chip": {          "radius":        10,          "color":         "@bg_panel",          "borderColor":   "@bg_border",          "borderWidth":   0.7,          "textColor":     "@fg",          "fontSize":      11,          "fontWeight":    600,          "letterSpacing": 0.3,          "padding":       { "horizontal": 9, "vertical": 4 }        },        "text": {          "textColor":     "@fg",          "fontSize":      13,          "fontWeight":    600,          "letterSpacing": 0.1,          "height":        1.3        }      },      "top": {        "alignment":          "topCenter",        "padding":            { "horizontal": 16, "vertical": 10 },        "hiddenOffset":       [0, -1],        "slideDurationMs":    300,        "opacityDurationMs":  250,        "slideCurve":         "easeOutCubic",        "opacityCurve":       "easeOut",        "showWhenLocked":     true,        "showWhenUnlocked":   true,        "itemSpacing":        6,        "groupSpacing":       10,        "absoluteCenter":     false,        "panelStyle": {          "radius":      20,          "blur":        24,          "color":       "@bg_panel",          "borderColor": "@bg_border",          "padding":     { "horizontal": 12, "vertical": 8 }        },        "normal": {          "left": [            {              "id": "back",              "tooltip": "Back",              "style": {                "color":       "@bg_panel",                "borderColor": "@bg_border",                "iconColor":   "@fg"              }            }          ],          "center": [            {              "id": "watching_label",              "topText":          "NOW PLAYING",              "topFontSize":      9.5,              "topFontWeight":    600,              "topColor":         "@accent",              "bottomFontSize":   13.5,              "bottomFontWeight": 700,              "bottomColor":      "@fg",              "gap":              3,              "textAlign":        "left"            },            { "id": "gap", "size": 8 },            {              "id": "episode_badge",              "style": {                "color":       "@accent_dim",                "borderColor": "@bg_border_hi",                "textColor":   "@accent",                "fontSize":    10.5,                "fontWeight":  700,                "padding":     { "horizontal": 8, "vertical": 3 }              }            },            {              "id": "quality_badge",              "style": {                "color":       "@cyan_dim",                "borderColor": "rgba(125, 207, 255, 0.28)",                "textColor":   "@cyan",                "fontSize":    10.5,                "fontWeight":  700,                "padding":     { "horizontal": 8, "vertical": 3 }              }            }          ],          "right": [            {              "id": "open_settings",              "tooltip": "Settings",              "style": {                "color":       "@bg_panel",                "borderColor": "@bg_border",                "iconColor":   "@fg_dim"              }            },            {              "id": "lock_controls",              "tooltip": "Lock Controls",              "visibleWhen": "unlocked",              "style": {                "color":       "@bg_panel",                "borderColor": "@bg_border",                "iconColor":   "@fg_dim"              }            },            {              "id": "toggle_fullscreen",              "tooltip": "Fullscreen",  "locked": {          "left":   [],          "center": [],          "right": [            {              "id": "unlock_controls",              "tooltip": "Unlock",              "style": {                "color":       "@rose_dim",                "borderColor": "rgba(247, 118, 142, 0.30)",                "iconColor":   "@rose"              }            }          ]        }      },      "middle": {        "alignment":          "center",        "padding":            { "horizontal": 20 },        "hiddenOffset":       [0, 0],        "hiddenScale":        0.88,        "scaleDurationMs":    280,        "scaleCurve":         "easeOutBack",        "opacityDurationMs":  220,        "showWhenLocked":     false,        "showWhenUnlocked":   true,        "itemSpacing":        10,        "panelStyle": {          "enabled": false        },        "normal": {          "items": [            {              "id": "previous_episode",              "enabledWhen": "canGoBackward",              "style": {                "size":        44,                "iconSize":    22,                "color":       "@bg_panel",                "borderColor": "@bg_border",                "iconColor":   "@fg_dim"              }            },            {              "id": "seek_back",              "seconds": 10,              "style": {                "size":        48,                "iconSize":    24,                "color":       "@bg_panel",                "borderColor": "@bg_border",                "iconColor":   "@fg"              }            },            {              "id": "play_pause",              "primary": true,              "style": {                "size":        62,                "iconSize":    30,                "radius":      20,                "color":       "@accent_dim",                "borderColor": "@bg_border_hi",                "iconColor":   "@accent"              }            },            {              "id": "seek_forward",              "seconds": 10,              "style": {                "size":        48,                "iconSize":    24,                "color":       "@bg_panel",                "borderColor": "@bg_border",                "iconColor":   "@fg"              }            },            {              "id": "next_episode",              "enabledWhen": "canGoForward",              "style": {                "size":        44,                "iconSize":    22,                "color":       "@bg_panel",                "borderColor": "@bg_border",                "iconColor":   "@fg_dim"              }            }          ]        }      },      "bottom": {        "alignment":             "bottomCenter",        "padding":               { "horizontal": 16, "vertical": 10 },        "hiddenOffset":          [0, 1],        "slideDurationMs":       300,        "opacityDurationMs":     250,        "slideCurve":            "easeOutCubic",        "showWhenLocked":        true,        "showWhenUnlocked":      true,        "showProgress":          true,        "progressStyle":         "capsule",        "progressPadding":       { "horizontal": 2 },        "progressBottomSpacing": 8,        "topRowBottomSpacing":   6,        "itemSpacing":           6,        "groupSpacing":          8,        "panelStyle": {          "radius":      22,          "blur":        26,          "color":       "@bg_panel",          "borderColor": "@bg_border",          "padding":     { "horizontal": 14, "vertical": 10 }        },        "normal": {          "outside": {            "left":   [],            "center": [],            "right": [              {                "id": "mega_seek",                "seconds": 85,                "tooltip": "Skip OP/ED",                "style": {                  "size":        36,                  "iconSize":    18,                  "color":       "@purple_dim",                  "borderColor": "rgba(187, 154, 247, 0.30)",                  "iconColor":   "@purple"                }              }            ]          },          "left": [            {              "id": "time_current",              "style": {                "color":       "@bg_panel",                "borderColor": "@bg_border",                "textColor":   "@accent",                "fontWeight":  700,                "fontSize":    11.5              }            },            {              "id": "time_remaining",              "style": {              }            },            { "id": "gap", "size": 4 },            {              "id": "playlist",              "tooltip": "Episodes",              "style": {                "size":       "fontWeight":  500,                "fontSize":    11              }            },            {              "id": "time_duration",              "style": {                "color":
